title: puccinellia distans subsp. sevangensis
intro: Puccinellia distans subsp. sevangensis, also known as Sevang grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sevang grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress. Sevang grass can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including bronchitis and other respiratory issues.
